piano.description: Piano-family bucket including acoustic, bright, electric grand, and honky-tonk piano.

chromatic_percussion.description: Thin family; keep coarse for now.

harmonica.description: Separate only if you want a dedicated reed-like class.

acoustic_guitar.description: Acoustic guitar bucket combining nylon and steel string acoustic guitars.

electric_guitar_clean.description: Clean and jazz electric guitar bucket.

electric_guitar_muted.description: Muted electric guitar has clearly different articulation.

distorted_guitar.description: Overdriven and distortion electric guitar bucket.

strings.description: Main bowed, ensemble, and synth string bucket without pizzicato, harp, or timpani.

pizzicato_strings.description: Pizzicato strings have distinct articulation and stay out of the main strings bucket.

orchestral_harp.description: Harp is plucked and timbrally distinct from bowed or section strings.

timpani.description: Timpani is percussion and should not be merged into the strings bucket.

orchestra_hit.description: Small but very distinct stab-like class.

brass.description: Merged acoustic and synth brass bucket.

synth_lead.description: Synth leads kept coarse within family.

synth_pad.description: Synth pads kept coarse within family.

ethnic.description: Coarse ethnic bucket unless region-specific labels matter.
